text.title: AI Feature Build vs Buy vs Finetune Decision Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for ai-feature-build-buy-finetune-decision.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the feature's quality target achievable with a vendor API at target cost + latency?

conclusion.verdict: BUY — cheapest path, document vendor lock-in mitigations
BUILD or FINETUNE — vendor disqualified by data policy
BUILD — accept long TTM as cost of control
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
